narrative:
Centerville-R (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,104 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
